title: sideritis hyssopifolia subsp. atlantica
intro: Sideritis hyssopifolia subsp. atlantica, also known as the Spanish giant or North African mountain tea, is a subspecies of the Sideritis hyssopifolia plant, a type of flowering plant in the mint family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils, which have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sideritis hyssopifolia subsp. atlantica include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried herb, and is also used in traditional medicine, where it is often combined with other herbs to create a range of herbal preparations.
